RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

file_path = "/mnt/data/assistant-VyjmbJfcHknEhGXfWTSyPa-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Filter for TRANSPORTATION sector
transport_df = df[df['sector'].str.upper() == 'TRANSPORTATION'].copy()

# Aggregate operating profit by company (or if not available, by quarter)
# Let's check columns for operating profit and time/company
transport_df.columns

# Create bar chart: operating_profit by company name (sum or mean)
agg = transport_df.groupby('name', as_index=False)['operating_profit'].sum().sort_values('operating_profit', ascending=False)

plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))
plt.bar(agg['name'], agg['operating_profit'], color='steelblue')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit (Sum)')
plt.title('TRANSPORTATION Sector - Operating Profit by Company')
plt.tight_layout()

out_path = "/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(out_path, dpi=200)
out_path

content.text:
I created a bar chart for the **TRANSPORTATION** sector showing **Operating Profit (summed) by company** from your uploaded CSV.

Download the chart here: **[transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png)**
